text: The New York Times has identified at least 17 damaged U.S. sites and other installations, several of which have been struck more than once since the war began. Our analysis is based on high-resolution, commercial satellite imagery, verified social media videos and statements by U.S. officials and Iranian state media.
title: The Strait of Hormuz is narrow — and shallow enough to lay minefields.

citability.title: The Strait of Hormuz is narrow — and shallow enough to lay minefields.
